headline: Enphase Energy Announces Conference Call to Review First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: Tuesday, April 28, 2026 at 4:30 p.m. Eastern TimeFREMONT, Calif., April 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), a global energy technology company, announced today that it will host a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, April 28, 2026 at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
